description: denim upper on the AS Canvas OX stays true to converses love for all things young and contemporary. Denim never goes out of style and the hard wearing fabric is perfect for all-year use. Style this with tonal denim pants and a T-shirt or casual shirt. UpperDenim upper for easy maintenance and durabilityRubber toe box for enhanced protection of the upper footLong denim tongue for added comfort and snug FitCentral lace ups with metal eyeletsMidsolePU midsole with textured foxing at the toe boxOutsoleRubber outsole with waffle patterned grooves on the forefoot and midfootDiagonal patterning all overshoe careMake a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot water Rub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brush Wash off with lukewarm waterWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
